title: Plan and manage infrastructure
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and manage infrastructure demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine infrastructure requirements

pcs.text: Access information regarding the characteristics of products and their respective market requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access information regarding the characteristics of products and their respective market requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access information regarding the characteristics of products and their respective market requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and use information from other organisational planning processes to inform infrastructure planning process.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and compare infrastructure required to efficiently achieve targeted production requirements, with those existing and available in the organisation.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and incorporate suitable controls into planning process.
